headline: Bernie Sanders Says Trump 'Lied' About 10% Credit Card Rate Cap, Points to Big Banks Making Billions Charging 25-30% Interest Rates
summary: Sen. Bernie Sanders (I-Vt) on Wednesday said President Donald Trump lied about his promise to cap credit card interest rates at 10% while major banks continued to earn billions from consumer lending. Banks Earned Billions From Credit Card Interest In...

headline: Bunzl (LSE:BNZL) Stock Sees Modest Fair Value Lift As Analysts Raise Targets
summary: Bunzl’s updated fair value price target of £26.55, compared with the previous £25.82, sits neatly inside a broader Street range that runs from around £26.00 to £30.00. Recent commentary from firms such as JPMorgan, which has a £26.10 target, shows how several analysts are clustering around similar levels while still differing on how much upside they see. As you read on, you will see how this evolving narrative around Bunzl’s price targets and assumptions matters for your own view of the...
